name: Rakhine State (Myanmar)
description: Flag of Rakhine State, of red over white over blue with the Rakhine state emblem at the centre.
history: Used by the Rakhine State government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.
